entry_exit.entry: Buy gaming hardware or publisher stocks (ATVI, EA, NVDA) on day of spike detection.
entry_exit.exit: Sell when activity falls below the 7-day moving average or after 5 trading days, whichever comes first.

trigger.description: Signal triggers when combined daily posts plus comments in target subreddits rises more than 50% compared to the 7-day moving average.
trigger.metric: daily percentage increase in total posts plus comments
